description: An Impressionist landscape showing a country road lined with tall poplar trees under a broad blue sky with white cumulus clouds. Two small figures walk along the path. The dominant tree at center-left rises dramatically above the surrounding vegetation, its foliage rendered in dappled strokes of green and blue. To the right in the middle distance, red-roofed houses of a small village are visible above a line of lower trees and green fields. The brushwork is loose and stippled, capturing the shimmering effect of light and air.
